title: Dave Inc. Q2 2024 Earnings Call: Strong Growth and Raised Guidance
text:
Dave reported exceptional Q2 2024 performance with 31% revenue growth reaching $80.1 million, marking the third consecutive quarter of accelerating year-over-year growth. The company achieved record adjusted EBITDA of $15.2 million while simultaneously reducing operating expenses for the fifth consecutive quarter.

Growth Metrics:
- Monthly transacting member base expanded to 2.3 million, up 18% year-over-year
- Extra cash product originations surged to $1.2 billion, representing 37% year-over-year increase
- Dave Card spending volume climbed 28% to $388 million
- Average revenue per user increased 11% in the quarter

Operational Achievements:
- Customer acquisition efficiency improved significantly, with marketing costs declining 28% year-over-year despite expanding the user base
- Customer acquisition cost reduced to $15, a 26% year-over-year decrease
- Credit performance strengthened, with the 28-day delinquency rate improving to 2.03%

Raised Guidance for 2024:
- Revenue: $310 million - $325 million, representing 20-25% growth
- Adjusted EBITDA guidance increased to $40 million - $50 million from the previous $30-40 million range

Strategic Priorities: Management emphasized three core strategies: efficient member acquisition, deeper engagement through extra cash products, and fostering Dave Card adoption to drive direct deposit penetration. The company is evaluating a second banking partner to diversify key relationships while maintaining its strong partnership with Evolve Bank.
